scenario_name: E-commerce shopping agent with payment-tool surface
description: A direct-to-consumer e-commerce platform deploys an AI shopping agent that browses the catalog, recommends products, manages a cart, and (with explicit confirmation) initiates a checkout flow. The agent has a product-search tool, a cart-state tool, and a checkout-initiation tool; actual payment-card collection happens in the platform's PCI-DSS-scoped payment UI, not the agent. The agent is also exposed to indirect prompt injection from product reviews, third-party merchant descriptions, and search-result snippets.
assumptions: Card data is never read by the agent; payment UI is separately PCI-scoped.
Checkout-initiation tool only places an order pending the user's PSP confirmation step.
Third-party merchant product descriptions are an untrusted content surface.

components.description: Shopping-agent orchestrator with product, cart, and checkout tools.
Checkout-initiation tool; requires user UI confirmation.
Product catalog with third-party merchant descriptions and customer reviews.
Injection-detection on merchant descriptions and reviews; output PII redaction.

risks_identified.rationale: Cart state and order history contain PII; LLM-output PII leakage possible.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: PII redaction at output; cart tool returns only the active customer's state.

risks_identified.rationale: Indirect prompt injection via product reviews or merchant descriptions could coerce the agent to misuse the checkout tool.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Injection-classifier on merchant content; user UI confirmation before any order placement.

risks_identified.rationale: PCI-DSS, GDPR (cart abandonment / behavioral profiling), CCPA, EU Consumer Rights Directive.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: PCI scope segregated from agent; consent capture for behavioral context.

risks_identified.rationale: Catalog-search tool is an LLM-driven query path; misshapen queries could expose unintended catalog facets.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Catalog tool accepts only typed, schema-validated query fields.

risks_identified.rationale: Shared agent surface for many concurrent customers; cross-customer cart leak if isolation breaks.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Per-session scope; cart-state never crosses sessions.

risks_identified.rationale: Revenue-critical customer-facing channel; agent outage propagates to direct revenue loss.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Static-recommendations fallback; full-site shopping remains available without the agent.

risks_identified.rationale: Adversarial merchants or review-spam campaigns inject content designed to bias rankings or recommend competitor products.
risks_identified.residual_rationale: Recommendation ranking includes business rules; pure-LLM ranking limited.

existing_controls.description: Checkout-initiation tool requires user UI confirmation before any order placement.
PCI-scoped payment UI is separate from agent surface; agent has no card-data path.
Injection-classifier on third-party merchant descriptions and reviews.
Catalog-search tool accepts only schema-validated query fields.
Per-session scope on cart and order tools.
Static recommendations + full-site fallback when the agent is degraded.

control_gaps.description: No semantic taint-tracking across merchant content and downstream agent decisions.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Tag merchant content provenance; require step-up confirmation for tool calls following ingestion of untrusted merchant content.

control_gaps.description: Recommendation ranking auditability for fairness/competition reasons is incomplete.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Add ranking-feature audit trail per recommendation; expose to consumer-protection inquiries.

control_gaps.description: No cost-harvesting protection on agent-tool chains.
control_gaps.suggested_remediation: Per-session tool-call budget caps; alert on cost-harvesting patterns.
